bgfx.cmake submodule pin
========================
commit: cf47cdd6b2dd1b45d19450b2b4c3a2267b6a9e87
tag:    v1.143.9248-540
date:   2026-05-12

Pinned for Phase 1 reproducibility. Bump via:
  cd third_party/bgfx
  git fetch
  git checkout <new-sha>
  cd ../..
  # update this file with the new sha + tag
  git add third_party/bgfx third_party/bgfx-version.txt
  git commit -m "build: bump bgfx to <tag>"
